positive: Symmetrical and intricate pattern of fantastical bioluminescent flora and fauna, creating a lush, cosmic jungle scene. The style is a fusion of Neo-Art Nouveau and psychedelic psychedelic psychedelia, rendered with strong, clean silhouettes and high contrast. Use a color palette dominated by deep indigo, midnight purple, electric cyan, and neon emerald green. The overall aesthetic must be highly detailed, vector-art quality, designed for apparel printing, with a subtle, ethereal glow.
